deviations.description: The modality has changed from permission to obligation, requiring the process to terminate if sending the SIM card takes more than 30 days. The process model does not include any activity or gateway that terminates the process after 30 days, resulting in a direct violation of the new obligation.
process_model_reference: send SIM card, process flow after 30 days

deviations.description: The compliance pattern has changed from a duration constraint on sending the SIM card to the existence of a process termination activity. The process model does not contain an explicit 'terminate process' activity triggered by exceeding 30 days, violating the new requirement.

The dimension has shifted from time (duration) to control flow (existence of termination). The process model does not implement a control flow that enforces process termination after 30 days, resulting in non-compliance.

The required activity has changed from 'send SIM card' to 'terminate process'. The process model does not include a 'terminate process' activity in response to exceeding the 30-day limit, violating the new requirement.

The temporal constraint enforcing a minimum duration for sending the SIM card has been removed and replaced with an obligation to terminate the process. The process model does not enforce process termination after 30 days, resulting in non-compliance with the stricter requirement.
